message:
feat(FJ-P2C-002-D2): implement API transform front-door in Rust

Enhance fj-api with transform composition support:
- ComposedTransform type for stacked transforms (jit+grad, vmap+grad)
- compose() helper for arbitrary transform stacks
- JitWrapped::compose_grad(), compose_vmap() combinators
- VmapWrapped::compose_grad() combinator
- with_backend(), with_mode() builder methods on all types

17 passing tests covering:
- Basic transforms: jit, grad, vmap, value_and_grad
- Composition: jit(grad), jit(vmap), vmap(grad), compose()
- Error paths: non-scalar grad, empty args, scalar vmap, grad(vmap)
- Mode config: hardened mode, composed with mode
- Semantic: jit identity proof, grad at zero/negative

Clippy clean. All 305+ workspace tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
